subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-01-13
subcodes.first_line: The very names of these people will be forgotten... In Baghdad I was a child nine years old. There and then he (Baha'o'llah) announced to me the Word, and I believed him.
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @devotion; sacrifice; consecration in teaching the Cause, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @suffering and imprisonment
